symbols: carnival tower — the festive excess and pageantry of Venetian civic life
Doge's Palace — the seat of temporal power hosting communal celebration
massed crowd — the collective revelry that precedes Lenten penance
description: A wide view of Venice's Piazzetta during carnival festivities. The Doge's Palace dominates the left side with its distinctive Gothic arcade and pink-and-white diamond-patterned facade. At center, a tall ornamental temporary tower or structure rises high, decorated with figures and topped by a figure performing an acrobatic rope-descent. A dense crowd fills the square below, rendered as a mass of tiny figures. The sky is pale and hazy. Additional buildings frame the right side of the composition.
